mapper.select: SELECT id, title, author, views, createdAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id DESC) AS numberPost FROM posts WHERE deletedAt IS NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, title, author, password, content, views, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id DESC) AS numberPost FROM posts WHERE deletedAt IS NULL ) t WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (title, author, password, content, views, createdAt, deletedAt) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{password}, #{content}, 0, NOW(), NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, content = #{content}, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
UPDATE posts SET deletedAt = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
UPDATE posts SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deletedAt IS NULL
